name: Creamy Artichoke Hazelnut Soup
recipeIngredient: 14 3/4 oz Jar Marinated Artichokes, drained and finely chopped
1/2 cup Hazelnuts, roasted, skinned, and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large pot over medium-low heat. Add the minced shallot and cook until softened.
2. Stir in the hazelnut oil, chicken stock, chopped artichoke hearts, and roasted hazelnuts. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, mix a little of the hot broth with rice flour until smooth. Stir this mixture into the soup.
4. Strain the soup through a medium mesh strainer or food mill to remove lumps.
5. Return the strained soup to the pot. Stir in the cream and cook until thickened.
6. Just before serving, stir in the sherry and chopped parsley.
Per Serving: Calories: 215, Protein: 7g, Carbohydrates: 13g, Fat: 16g, Saturated Fat: 4g, Cholesterol: 14mg, Sodium: 276mg, Fiber: 4g.
